crime.value: Murder by stabbing with plastic knife in back of neck during picnic; question: which of six girlfriends killed him?
crime.quote: So, I threw a plastic knife into the back of his neck.

victim.value: Mr. Sampson, a man secretly dating six women simultaneously, making him a target for betrayed lovers
victim.quote: They found out that he was dating six women. They were Rita, Lauren, Peggy, Gail, Janice, and Elaine.

closed_world.value: Limited to six known girlfriends of the victim, creating a bounded suspect pool
closed_world.quote: They found out that he was dating six women.

culprit_and_motive.value: Elaine killed Sampson because he was cheating on her and laughed when she asked him to stop
culprit_and_motive.quote: I knew he was cheating on me, so I asked him to stop. He laughed.

resolution.value: Elaine confesses after inconsistencies emerge during investigation and interrogation
resolution.quote: she confessed to murdering Mr. Sampson.

investigator.value: Kelsey, a pregnant detective working with her husband/partner Rian to solve the case
investigator.quote: shouted Rian, Kelsey's partner and husband, 'You are pregnant'

suspect_architecture.value: Six girlfriends of victim, each with distinct eliminating characteristics: Rita (no lipstick, rifle access), Lauren (tall, chemical access but flower allergy), Peggy (no lipstick, grape allergy), Gail (teacher, hates yellow), Janice (petite size 4, hair stylist), Elaine (size 5 feet, teacher, loves daisies)
suspect_architecture.quote: They found out that he was dating six women. They were Rita, Lauren, Peggy, Gail, Janice, and Elaine.

red_herring.value: Rita's father owning a rifle range when murder weapon was actually a knife, misdirecting toward gunshot wound
red_herring.quote: When she learned that Rita's father owned a riffle range she called the forensics team

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence presented to reader simultaneously with investigators: size 5 footprint, plastic knife, car treads from victim's car, lipstick smudges at scene
clue_fairness.quote: the female footprint the found was size five, the car treads were from Mr. Sampson's car

social_world.value: Working class professional environment: florist, teacher, hair stylist, chemical supply house worker, basketball player - no significant power hierarchies explored
social_world.quote: She worked as a florist and seemed quite nice

alibi.value: Gail's aerobics class alibi at 7:30 PM on Friday, taught by Janice who was also there, creating mutual alibis for both suspects
alibi.quote: like always she was at aerobics on Friday. The aerobics teacher was Janice

reveal_mechanic.value: Confession through psychological pressure and contradictory statements about not knowing each other - Janice and Elaine both claim never meeting despite living situation
reveal_mechanic.quote: she said she never met Elaine... Elaine told them that she never met Janice

investigator_wound.value: Pregnant detective Kelsey working against medical orders, creating physical vulnerability and time pressure as she goes into labor during case resolution
investigator_wound.quote: You are pregnant can't you wait at least a week after the baby is born to come back to work

_meta.title: ebook kelemen a picnic 039 s murder
